subjects.description: Small colorful parrot perched on a wooden desk beside a vintage typewriter.
subjects.appearance_details: Bright blue and green feathers, curved beak, glossy dark eyes, delicate claws gripping the desk edge and typewriter keys.
subjects.relationship: Single playful bird subject interacting with the typewriter as the focus of the cozy room.
subjects.location: Foreground on the wooden desk, centered near the typewriter carriage.
subjects.relative_size: Small compared with the typewriter, books, and desk items, but visually prominent through color contrast.
subjects.orientation: Body angled toward the typewriter, head tilting between the keys and the room.
subjects.pose: Perched upright with one foot near the keys and wings tucked.
subjects.action: Taps at the typewriter keys with its beak and claws as if typing.
subjects.state_changes: Begins watching the keys, pecks and taps during the middle segment, ends with a curious head tilt as the typewriter carriage shifts slightly.
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: Feathered body with smooth vivid plumage and fine texture around the face and neck.
subjects.facial_features: Small curved beak, round dark eyes, compact head with bright feather markings.

background_setting: Cozy well lit room with a warm wooden desk, a small potted plant, stacked old books, and nostalgic desk objects surrounding a slightly worn vintage typewriter.

lighting.conditions: Soft warm indoor light from the side, gentle highlights on metal typewriter keys, comfortable shadows around books and desk objects.
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: Soft warm indoor light from the side, gentle highlights on metal typewriter keys, comfortable shadows around books and desk objects.

aesthetics.composition: Whimsical, nostalgic, charming, tactile wood grain, bright feathers against warm browns and muted paper tones.
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Whimsical, nostalgic, charming, tactile wood grain, bright feathers against warm browns and muted paper tones.

cinematography.camera_motion: Medium close shot from desk height, slow push in toward the parrot and typewriter, shallow depth of field on background knick knacks.
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: Realistic text to video with playful animal behavior and detailed prop animation.
artistic_style: Cozy cinematic realism with a storybook sense of humor and gentle vintage color grading.
context: A bright parrot appears to compose something on an old typewriter in a quiet, nostalgic study corner.

actions.description: The parrot studies the typewriter, shifting its feet on the desk while warm light catches its feathers.
It pecks and taps several keys with quick precise movements, making the typewriter hammers twitch.
The bird pauses, tilts its head proudly, and the typewriter carriage gives a tiny nostalgic bounce.

temporal_caption: 0:00-0:02 a colorful parrot inspects a vintage typewriter. 0:02-0:05 it taps the keys like a tiny typist. 0:05-0:07 it pauses with a curious, satisfied head tilt.
